checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present and substantive

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 3 flows: flow_1 (Contact Sync, 12 nodes/13 edges), flow_2 (New Segment Campaign, 10 nodes/9 edges), flow_3 (Bidirectional Unsubscribe, 11 nodes/13 edges). All well-connected with error nodes.

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: 1 polling trigger: */5 * * * * every 5 minutes. Valid cron.

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 5 adoption_questions added: airtable_base_id, airtable_table_name, mailchimp_list_id, slack_channel, auto_trigger_campaigns

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical findings. Compliance safety: never re-subscribe opted-out contacts explicitly stated. Bidirectional unsubscribe sync protects PII.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 80+ words. Instructions cover 5 major sections plus state management: change detection, Mailchimp sync, campaign triggers, bidirectional unsubscribes, Slack reporting, and state file management. Tool guidance has specific API endpoints with query params and body formats for all 3 services plus local files. 3 concrete examples. Comprehensive error handling.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: All tools (http_request, file_read, file_write) mapped to specific operations. Airtable filterByFormula, Mailchimp subscriber hash (MD5), batch operations — all documented. No phantom tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: 5-minute polling trigger matches the prompt's polling cycle description exactly. Change detection via timestamp comparison is well-designed.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: All 3 service_flow entries fully backed with detailed connector definitions including data_center field for Mailchimp.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Dual state files: sync_state.json (timestamps, campaign templates) and segment_cache.json (contact-to-tag mapping for change detection). Excellent design with unsubscribe tracking for compliance.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Covers rate limits for all 3 services with specific thresholds (Airtable 5/s, Mailchimp 10 concurrent, Slack 1/s). API failures with retry logic. Data integrity with unsubscribe compliance checks. State recovery for missing/corrupted files. Consecutive failure alerting.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 flows (contact sync, segment campaign trigger, bidirectional unsubscribe) are fully described in the prompt with step-by-step procedures matching the flow diagrams.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Clear outcome: eliminates manual audience list management, ensures compliance, automates campaign triggers. Replaces 4 separate workflows with real-time sync.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Airtable, Mailchimp, Slack APIs are standard. The 5-minute polling with change detection is practical. Mailchimp batch operations well-documented. Data center routing adds minor complexity.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Intelligent change detection, compliance-aware sync, automatic campaign triggers for new segments, and bidirectional unsubscribe handling — substantial reasoning beyond basic sync.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: All 5 questions target essential config: base_id and table for Airtable, list_id for Mailchimp, channel for Slack, and campaign automation toggle for human-in-the-loop control.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Good defaults for table_name (Contacts), slack_channel (#marketing-ops), auto_trigger_campaigns (Yes). airtable_base_id and mailchimp_list_id must be user-provided. User needs to fill 2 values.

issues: No adoption_questions existed — 5 added covering Airtable, Mailchimp, Slack, and campaign automation config
Airtable and Mailchimp connectors may not have builtin definitions

template: Added 5 adoption_questions: airtable_base_id, airtable_table_name, mailchimp_list_id, slack_channel, auto_trigger_campaigns
Included use_case_ids on auto_trigger_campaigns to scope it to the campaign trigger flow
Used boolean type for campaign trigger toggle with human_in_the_loop category
